criteria.name: Personalization Accuracy
criteria.description: How accurately the app predicts user needs and preferences based on AI algorithms analyzing user data (e.g., past purchases, browsing history, demographics).
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store descriptions, expert reviews.

criteria.name: Recommendation Diversity
criteria.description: The variety of product recommendations provided by the app, ensuring users are exposed to a range of options and not just similar items.

criteria.name: Search and Discovery
criteria.description: Effectiveness of AI-powered search and filtering capabilities to help users find specific products or browse related items.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, app testing.

criteria.name: Price Comparison
criteria.description: Ability of the app to compare prices across different retailers using AI to find the best deals for the user.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience (UI/UX)
criteria.description: Overall ease of use and visual appeal of the app, contributing to a seamless shopping experience.
